title: Deepcraft
description: A hardcore Minecraft mod with new ore, weapons, bosses, mobs, a unique dimension, haunting music, and forgotten secrets waiting to be uncovered.
body:
# **A Hardcore Expansion into The End**
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25801787cca5ff84fafa0e60fa5aafe1c3a8c6b3.png)

Step beyond the End and descend into the Void with Deepcraft, a hardcore Minecraft mod that transforms your survival into a brutal journey of discovery and dread.

Uncover Wolfrite, an ultra-rare ore found only on the outer End islands — unreachable until the Ender Dragon falls. Craft enchanted gear from it, but to obtain true power, endure a multi-step forging process: smelt Frithon or Volum into refined materials, compress them into ingots, then merge them with Dragon’s Breath and Windburn Hearts — rare drops from flying, long-range elemental mobs.

Explore the Void, a nightmarish dimension filled with aggressive mobs and hostile skies. Face the Oblivion Warden, summoned by interacting with Pandora’s Chest in End cities. Use the dropped Void Activator to unlock Pandora’s stronghold deep in the Void, where Pandora awaits. Defeat her to gain the Heart of the Void and forge the ultimate Void Multitool — your key to unstoppable survival.

Wander through Havana, a mysterious biome home to alien trees, unique crops, and new variants of chickens, pigs, cows, zombies, and creepers — all accompanied by ambient bird songs and an original soundtrack. Seek rare music discs, a painting, unopenable doors, and versatile storage blocks, all immersed in a fully customized soundscape.

Deepcraft isn’t just a mod — it’s a descent into madness. Are you worthy of mastering the Void?

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aefc9b061ce553f76ea82ae190c84dcbf705331d_0.webp)
